name: Beef and Macaroni Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1.5 pounds Ground beef; browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the cooked noodles in oil.
2. Place the mixture in a greased Crock-POT.
3. Add all remaining ingredients, except grated cheese. Stir thoroughly.
4. Sprinkle cheese over top.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 4 to 8 hours (High: 2 to 3 hours).
